item.title:
NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 21min A tough look for our guy Neil here. The word that comes to mind is… cavalier?
The ful
item.description:
No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 21min A tough look for our guy Neil here. The word that comes to mind is… cavalier?
The full story can be found in the two-part "Wild World of Golf" series from Casa de Campo - now on our YouTube channel. 5 2 43 19 mil

item.title: NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 5s En respuesta a @NoLayingUp youtube.com Wild World of Golf: Last Man Standing Part 1 (Casa
item.description: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 5s En respuesta a @NoLayingUp youtube.com Wild World of Golf: Last Man Standing Part 1 (Casa de Campo) Wild World of Golf is back (with a twist). Five players compete to be the last man standing at Casa de Campo in the Dominican Republic. Part two premieres on... 1

item.title: NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 4s En respuesta a @NoLayingUp youtube.com No Laying Up 1.2K likes, 103 comments. "Wild World
item.description: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 4s En respuesta a @NoLayingUp youtube.com No Laying Up 1.2K likes, 103 comments. "Wild World of Golf: Last Man Standing Part 2 (Casa de Campo)"

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 24min Kurt Kitayama cards a bogey-free 65 in the second round of the RBC Heritag
item.description:
PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 24min Kurt Kitayama cards a bogey-free 65 in the second round of the RBC Heritage.
It marks his lowest score in eight career rounds at Harbour Town Golf Links and is one stroke shy of his season-low 64 at The Genesis Invitational where he finished T2, his lone top-10 this season. 1 1 13 3 mil

item.title: golfweek: Brandel Chamblee reposteó Golfweek @golfweek · 3h LIV Golf outlived its usefulness to Saudi Arabia De golfweek.usatoday.
item.description: Brandel Chamblee reposteó Golfweek @golfweek · 3h LIV Golf outlived its usefulness to Saudi Arabia De golfweek.usatoday.com 7 8 33 5 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 43min It's my view that this is the beginning of the end for LIV Golf. Been wrong before, othe
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 43min It's my view that this is the beginning of the end for LIV Golf. Been wrong before, others will feel differently. But I've had a go at assessing where we are, what I make of it, and what the future may hold. De sportinglife.com 5 2 44 3 mil
